howItWorks.title: How it works

hero.title: MAKE VIDEOS IN ONE CLICK
hero.subtitle: Use presets for camera control, framing, and VFX — or go fully manual with prompts.

edit.2: Optionally add up to 4 element images to keep characters/style consistent.
edit.3: Describe what to change (and what to keep) in the prompt, then generate.

flf.1: Upload a start frame and an end frame.
flf.3: Generate to create a smooth transformation.

t2v.1: Describe your scene (subject, camera, lighting, style).
t2v.2: Choose ratio/duration and optionally add a negative prompt.
t2v.3: Generate and iterate with small changes.

howItWorks.tip: Tip: Be specific. Tell the model what must stay the same (identity, logo, composition).

videoTasks.title: Video tasks:
videoTasks.body: You can run up to 5 tasks at the same time. Monthly limit: 300. After reaching the monthly cap, slow mode applies: daily cap 30 videos per 24 hours, and 10 tasks per hour.

imageTasks.title: Image tasks:
imageTasks.body: Up to 300 tasks per month. Fast mode applies until the 300th task (5 per minute). After that, slow mode limits to 1 task per minute.

premiumModels.title: Premium models:
premiumModels.body: Some high-cost models are not included in UNLIMITED plans. VEO 3.* non-fast variants and Sora-2 /pro variants still consume credits.

toast.submitted: Request submitted. We'll reach out soon.

card.title: Enterprise Plan
card.subtitle: Custom pricing and support
card.description: Need invoicing, compliance, or a custom workflow? Tell us what you need.

requirements.label: Tell us about your project and requirements
requirements.placeholder: What are you building? What workflows, compliance needs, and expected volume do you have?

validation.websiteInvalid: Website must be a valid URL

proBenefits.question: What are the benefits of PRO membership?
proBenefits.answer: PRO membership gives you 1000 credits every month (worth $10), priority access to new features, faster video generation, advanced editing options, and priority customer support.

cancelAnytime.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
cancelAnytime.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your benefits will continue until the end of your current billing period.

discountNote.title: Special Note for Discounted Subscriptions:
discountNote.body: If you subscribed using a coupon discount and have used credits exceeding the discounted amount during your first month, you can only cancel your subscription after the second month's payment is processed. This policy ensures fair usage of promotional offers.

monthlyVsYearly.question: Is there a difference between monthly and yearly subscriptions?
monthlyVsYearly.answer: Yes, yearly subscriptions offer a significant discount compared to monthly subscriptions. You'll save approximately 20% when choosing annual billing.

whatAreCredits.question: What are ReelMind Credits?
whatAreCredits.answer: ReelMind Credits are the virtual currency used on our platform to generate AI videos and images. Different features require different amounts of credits. For example, generating a standard video (480p) costs 50 credits, while an HD video (720p) costs 80 credits.

earnCredits.question: How can I earn credits?
earnCredits.intro: You can earn credits in several ways:

items.membership: Through membership plans (PRO members get 1000 credits monthly, MAX members get 2000)
items.newUser: New users receive 100 free credits upon registration
items.posting: Posting content on ReelMind (50 credits per day)

expire.question: Do credits expire?
expire.answer: The credits you purchase directly will not expire and will remain in your account until used. Your monthly granted credits will be reset at the beginning of each month. Any unused credits from previous months will not carry over.

refund.question: Can I get a refund for unused credits?
refund.answer: We do not offer refunds for purchased credits. However, if you encounter technical issues that prevented the proper use of your credits, please contact our support team, and we'll address your concerns.

membershipVsCredits.question: What's the difference between membership and credits?
membershipVsCredits.answer: Memberships provide a monthly allotment of credits along with additional benefits like priority processing and access to exclusive features. Credits can be purchased separately without a membership and are consumed when generating content. Choose a membership for regular usage or buy credits for occasional use.
